import React from'react';import{Building2,Users,Briefcase,Globe,Zap}from'lucide-react';/**
 * TrustedBy component - Shows trust indicators with company logos/icons
 * @param {Object} props - Component props
 * @param {string} props.text - Trust text (default: "Trusted by 1000+ teams worldwide")
 * @param {Array} props.companies - Array of company objects with name and icon
 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TrustedBy=_ref=>{let{text="Trusted by 1000+ teams worldwide",companies=[{name:"TechCorp",icon:Building2},{name:"StartupHub",icon:Users},{name:"Enterprise Inc",icon:Briefcase},{name:"Global Solutions",icon:Globe},{name:"Innovation Labs",icon:Zap}]}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bg-white py-12 md:py-16",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text-center mb-8",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm sm:text-base text-gray-500 font-medium",children:text})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-8 md:gap-12",children:companies.map((company,index)=>{const IconComponent=company.icon;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-center opacity-60 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity duration-300",title:company.name,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center space-x-2",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IconComponent,{className:"w-6 h-6 text-gray-400"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 hidden sm:block",children:company.name})]})},index);})})]})});};export default TrustedBy;
